name: Grilled Squid with Sweet and Sour Cucumber, Corn and Viadalias
recipeIngredient: 4 pounds whole squid, skinned and cleaned
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush the squid lightly with olive oil on both sides.
2. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Grill the squid for 20-30 seconds on each side.
4. Slice the grilled squid into 1/2-inch slices.
5. Toss the sliced squid with the Sweet and Sour Cucumber Salad and marinade.
6. Serve.
